Platform: square social product launch image
Required canvas: 1080 x 1080 px
Required aspect ratio: 1:1
Safe margin: keep essential copy, app icon, and CTA at least 72 px from every edge.
Minimum readable type: product name at least 34 px equivalent; headline at least 62 px; supporting line and CTA at least 30 px.
Logo/icon: current FlowForge app icon or compact wordmark must be in the top-right safe area, not bottom-centered.
Hero visual: planning-board UI may overlap the central and right zones but must not obscure required copy.
CTA: place in the lower area as a restrained product action, not a large marketing banner.
Override rule: these platform dimensions and safe margins override any looser proportions implied by template.yaml.
